ḪA.LA-MEŠ ša₂ [...]

Shares of [...]

o 2'2'

ša₂ mšu-ma-a [...] ⸢ša₂ m⸣ŠEŠ-MEŠe-a 22? x

of Šumaya [...] of Ahhea: 22 ....

o 3'3'

ḪA.LA ša₂ mdna-na-a—MU A-šu₂ ša₂ mdna-na-a—DU₃uš

Share of Nanaya-iddin, son of Nanaya-ipuš;

o 4'4'

mdNA₃—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—bu-luṭ A-šu₂ ša₂ mba-laṭ-su

Nabu-ahhe-bulluṭ, son of Balassu;

o 5'5'

mMU—dU.GUR A-šu₂ ša₂ mid-di-ia

Iddin-Nergal, son of Iddiya;

o 6'6'

mdNA₃—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU A-šu₂ ša₂ mšul-lum-ma-a

Nabu-ahhe-iddin, son of Šullummaya;

o 7'7'

mŠEŠ-MEŠe-a A-šu₂ ša₂ mina—SUḪ₃—SURir

Ahhea, son of Ina-teši-eṭir;

o 8'8'

mša₂—dNA₃—šu-u₂ A-šu₂ ša₂ mdNA₃—u₂-še-zib

Ša-Nabu-šu, son of Nabu-ušezib

o 9'9'

mdNA₃—MU—GARun A-šu₂ ša₂ mdEN—SUR

(and) Nabu-šum-iškun, son of Bel-eṭir.

Bottom
b.e. 1b.e. 1

ḪA.LA-MEŠ ša₂ 50e ša₂ mšu-ma-a ša₂ mŠEŠ-MEŠ⸢e-a 12? U₄?⸣ x

Shares which (are) the 50th part of Šumaya; of Ahhea; 12 ...

ša₂ UGU id₂ḫar-ri ša₂ mla-⸢ba-ši⸣ [...]

which (is) on the Harru canal; of Labaši [...].
